category_sources: source_facts.description says wrapper around all package managers with a unifying CLI; official GitHub repository says it wraps all package managers.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is meta-package-manager; official documentation homepage and GitHub repository title use Meta Package Manager.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub Pages documentation; official GitHub README also links installation and usage documentation.
repo_sources: Official GitHub repository for kdeldycke/meta-package-manager matches source_facts.homepage and package name.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a unifying package-manager CLI; official GitHub topics and README describe package-manager support across platforms.
